monitors.name: [Dofurs] 429 Rate-Limit Spike (sev2)
monitors.query: sum(last_5m):sum:http.requests{service:dofurs-single-page-website,status:429,route_group:(bookings OR payments OR admin)} / sum:http.requests{service:dofurs-single-page-website,route_group:(bookings OR payments OR admin)} > 0.05
monitors.message: 429 rate exceeded 5% for bookings/payments/admin. Investigate client retry behavior and abusive traffic. Notify #ops-alerts. Escalate if >=15% for 10m.

monitors.name: [Dofurs] Booking Create Failures (sev1)
monitors.message: Booking create 5xx count is elevated. Core revenue flow is degraded. Page on-call and rollback if regression is confirmed. Notify #ops-critical.

monitors.name: [Dofurs] Webhook HTTP Failures (sev1)
monitors.message: Webhook endpoint 5xx failures detected. Payment/subscription drift risk is high. Notify #ops-critical and validate signature + DB health.

monitors.name: [Dofurs] Bookings p95 Latency SLO (sev2)
monitors.message: Bookings p95 latency breached 1200ms target. Investigate DB latency, cold starts, and route hot paths. Notify #ops-alerts.

monitors.name: [Dofurs] Payments p95 Latency SLO (sev2)
monitors.message: Payments p95 latency breached 1500ms target. Investigate provider API delays and DB contention. Notify #ops-alerts.

monitors.name: [Dofurs] Admin p95 Latency SLO (sev3)
monitors.message: Admin p95 latency breached 1000ms target. Investigate admin API bottlenecks. Notify #ops-observability.
